_publications._publicationTitle: A High-Throughput Screening Platform Identifies Novel Combination Treatments for Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors.

_contextSnippet: from sixteen combinations for sNF96.2, four combined Sirolimus (mTOR inhibitor) with AT-9283, Cabozantinib, Crizotinib, and CUDC-101
details: 16 combinations met DBSumNeg values lower than -7, with 4 combining Sirolimus
